relations.evidence: Mavacamten Treatment for Symptomatic Obstructive Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy
A Long-Term Safety Extension Study of Mavacamten
Clinical Study to Evaluate Mavacamten [MYK-461] in Adults With Symptomatic Obstructive Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy
21 patients had an adverse event of atrial fibrillation, including 11 with no prior history
8 patients experienced an adverse event of cardiac failure
Twelve patients (5.2%) developed transient reductions in site-read echocardiogram left ventricular ejection fraction of <50%, resulting in temporary treatment interruption
NT-proBNP reductions were sustained through 84 weeks
patients showed improvements in left ventricular outflow tract (LVOT) gradients
